markets.question: Chongqing Tonglianglong FC vs. Chengdu Rongcheng FC: Both Teams to Score
markets.description:
In the upcoming Chinese Super League game between Chongqing Tonglianglong FC and Chengdu Rongcheng FC, scheduled for March 21 at 7:35 AM ET:

This market will resolve to "Yes" if both Chongqing Tonglianglong FC and Chengdu Rongcheng FC each score at least one goal during the game.

This market will resolve to "No" if either team fails to score (i.e., if one or both teams finish with zero goals).

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50–50.

If the game is started but not completed, this market will resolve according to the official final score published on csl-china.com. This market refers only to the outcome within the first 90 minutes of regular play plus stoppage time.

The primary resolution source for this market is the official statistics of the event as recognized by the governing body or event organizers. However, if the governing body or event organizers have not published final match statistics within 2 hours after the event's conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead.

events.title: Chongqing Tonglianglong FC vs. Chengdu Rongcheng FC - More Markets
events.description: More markets for the Chinese Super League game, scheduled for March 21 at 7:35 AM ET.

markets.question: Will the price of Bitcoin be above $74,000 on March 14?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to "Yes" if the Binance 1 minute candle for BTC/USDT 12:00 in the ET timezone (noon) on the date specified in the title has a final "Close" price higher than the price specified in the title. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "No".

The resolution source for this market is Binance, specifically the BTC/USDT "Close" prices currently available at https://www.binance.com/en/trade/BTC_USDT with "1m" and "Candles" selected on the top bar.

Please note that this market is about the price according to Binance BTC/USDT, not according to other exchanges or trading pairs.

Price precision is determined by the number of decimal places in the source.

markets.question: Spread: Henan FC (-1.5)
markets.description:
In the upcoming Chinese Super League game, scheduled for March 21 at 7:00 AM ET:

This market will resolve to "Henan FC" if Henan FC win the game by 2 or more goals.

Otherwise, this market will resolve to "Wuhan San Zhen FC".

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50–50.

This market will resolve according to the official final score published on csl-china.com. This market refers only to the outcome within the first 90 minutes of regular play plus stoppage time.

The primary resolution source for this market is the official statistics of the event as recognized by the governing body or event organizers. However, if the governing body or event organizers have not published final match statistics within 2 hours after the event's conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead.

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50–50.

If the game is started but not completed, this market will resolve according to the official final score published on csl-china.com. This market refers only to the outcome within the first 90 minutes of regular play plus stoppage time.

The primary resolution source for this market is the official statistics of the event as recognized by the governing body or event organizers. However, if the governing body or event organizers have not published final match statistics within 2 hours after the event's conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead.

In the upcoming Chinese Super League game, scheduled for March 21 at 3:30 AM ET:

This market will resolve to "Beijing Guoan FC" if Beijing Guoan FC win the game by 2 or more goals.

Otherwise, this market will resolve to "Shanghai Shenhua FC".

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50–50.

This market will resolve according to the official final score published on csl-china.com. This market refers only to the outcome within the first 90 minutes of regular play plus stoppage time.

The primary resolution source for this market is the official statistics of the event as recognized by the governing body or event organizers. However, if the governing body or event organizers have not published final match statistics within 2 hours after the event's conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead.
